trans-unit.id: Allow Discord Join/Invite requests from anyone. (Friends only when disabled)
trans-unit.source: Allow Discord Join/Invite requests from anyone. (Friends only when disabled)
trans-unit.target: Consenti le richieste di adesione/invito di Discord da chiunque. (Soltanto dagli amici quando disabilitato)

trans-unit.id: Limit In-Game camera photos stored on PC
trans-unit.source: Limit In-Game camera photos stored on PC
trans-unit.target: Limita le foto della videocamera di gioco memorizzate sul PC

trans-unit.id: on - Allows anyone to send you a personal server invite or a channel based invite.\noff - Disables the ability for users other then your Discord friends to send you invites.
trans-unit.source: on - Allows anyone to send you a personal server invite or a channel based invite.\noff - Disables the ability for users other then your Discord friends to send you invites.
trans-unit.target: on - Consente a chiunque di inviarti un invito al server personale o un invito basato sul canale.\noff - Disabilita la capacità per gli utenti che non sono tuoi amici su Discord, di inviarti inviti.
Consenti le richieste di adesione/invito di Discord

trans-unit.id: Swimming burns a lot of calories.
trans-unit.source: Swimming burns a lot of calories.

trans-unit.id: Be careful when swimming long distances!
trans-unit.source: Be careful when swimming long distances!
trans-unit.target: Fai attenzione quando nuoti per grandi distanze!

trans-unit.id: If you run out of calories while swimming, you will become exhausted and wake up on the shore.
trans-unit.source: If you run out of calories while swimming, you will become exhausted and wake up on the shore.
trans-unit.target: Se esaurisci le calorie durante il nuoto, diverrai esausto e ti sveglierai sulla riva.

trans-unit.id: Flood tool! Left click on the water to remove the top layer, or Right click on a block to add a water layer.
trans-unit.source: Flood tool! Left click on the water to remove the top layer, or Right click on a block to add a water layer.
trans-unit.target: Strumento d'inondazione! Click con il sinistro sull'acqua per rimuovere lo strato superiore, o click con il destro su un blocco per aggiungere uno strato d'acqua.

trans-unit.id: Curtains woven using the finest cotton. \n\n (Only cosmetic does not impact room value.)
trans-unit.source: Curtains woven using the finest cotton. \n\n (Only cosmetic does not impact room value.)
trans-unit.target: Tende intrecciate usando il miglior cotone. \n\n (Solo cosmetico, non influenza il valore della stanza.)

trans-unit.id: Curtains made out of plastic? \n\n (Only cosmetic does not impact room value.)
trans-unit.source: Curtains made out of plastic? \n\n (Only cosmetic does not impact room value.)
trans-unit.target: Tende in plastica? \n\n (Solo cosmetico, non influenza il valore della stanza.)

trans-unit.id: Curtains woven using the finest wool. \n\n (Only cosmetic does not impact room value.)
trans-unit.source: Curtains woven using the finest wool. \n\n (Only cosmetic does not impact room value.)
trans-unit.target: Tende intrecciate usando la migliore lana. \n\n (Solo cosmetico, non influenza il valore della stanza.)

trans-unit.id: A basic backpack to carry supplies.\n\n(Increases max carry weight by 5 kg)
trans-unit.source: A basic backpack to carry supplies.\n\n(Increases max carry weight by 5 kg)
trans-unit.target: Uno zaino di base per trasportare rifornimenti.\n\n(Aumenta il peso trasportabile massimo di 5 kg)

trans-unit.id: Can you carry as much as a bear! Not really, but it helps you carry more.\n\n(Increases max carry weight by 15 kg)
trans-unit.source: Can you carry as much as a bear! Not really, but it helps you carry more.\n\n(Increases max carry weight by 15 kg)
trans-unit.target: Potresti trasportare un orso! Non davvero, ma ti aiuta a trasportare di più.\n\n(Aumenta il peso massimo trasportabile di 15kg)

trans-unit.id: A survival backpack that offers more support than the basic backpack.\n\n(Increases max carry weight by 10 kg)
trans-unit.source: A survival backpack that offers more support than the basic backpack.\n\n(Increases max carry weight by 10 kg)
trans-unit.target: Uno zaino da sopravvivenza che offre maggiore supporto dello zaino di base.\n\n(Aumenta il peso massimo trasportabile di 10 kg)

trans-unit.id: Snug work boots with side zippers.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Snug work boots with side zippers.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Stivali da lavoro aderenti con zip laterali.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 30%)

trans-unit.id: Also called chapeau � bec, or Billed Hat in france due to it's bird-beak like appearance.
trans-unit.source: Also called chapeau � bec, or Billed Hat in france due to it's bird-beak like appearance.
trans-unit.target: Anche detto chapeau � bec, o feluca, a causa del suo aspetto simile a un becco di volatile.

trans-unit.id: Hide from the animals!\n\n(Reduces the detection range of animals)
trans-unit.source: Hide from the animals!\n\n(Reduces the detection range of animals)
trans-unit.target: Nasconditi dagli animali!\n\n(Riduce il raggio di rilevamento degli animali)

trans-unit.id: Hide from the animals!\n\n(Reduces the detection range of animals)
trans-unit.source: Hide from the animals!\n\n(Reduces the detection range of animals)

trans-unit.id: A steel hardhat with a light source for the darkest places.\n\n(Flashlight)
trans-unit.source: A steel hardhat with a light source for the darkest places.\n\n(Flashlight)
trans-unit.target: Un elmetto d'acciaio con un fonte luminosa per i luoghi più bui.\n\n(Torcia)

trans-unit.id: Simple low indoors working shoes helps avoiding slipping on wet surfaces in a large kitchen.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Simple low indoors working shoes helps avoiding slipping on wet surfaces in a large kitchen.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Semplici scarpe basse da lavoro da interno che aiutano a evitare di scivolare sulle superfici bagnate in una grande cucina.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 30%)

trans-unit.id: Boots with rubber soles and thermal insulation for comfort yet still be durabable.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Boots with rubber soles and thermal insulation for comfort yet still be durabable.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Stivali con suole in gomma e isolamento termico per comodità, ma resistenti.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando strumenti del 30%)

trans-unit.id: Waterproof rubber sole boots with synthetic lining that provides protection against the elements when working in the fields.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Waterproof rubber sole boots with synthetic lining that provides protection against the elements when working in the fields.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Stivali impermeabili da uomo con suola in gomma con rivestimento sintetico, che forniscono protezione dagli elementi, quando si lavora nei campi.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 30%)

trans-unit.id: A sturdy pair of rubber footwear designed to provide protection against water, rain, and mud.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)
trans-unit.source: A sturdy pair of rubber footwear designed to provide protection against water, rain, and mud.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)
trans-unit.target: Un paio di calzature resistenti in gomma, progettate per fornire protezione da acqua, pioggia e fango.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 10%)

trans-unit.id: Smaller than your standard three-day backpack. You can't fit that much inside, but that makes you more agile.\n\n(Increases movement speed and increases max carry weight by 5 kg)
trans-unit.source: Smaller than your standard three-day backpack. You can't fit that much inside, but that makes you more agile.\n\n(Increases movement speed and increases max carry weight by 5 kg)
trans-unit.target: Più piccolo del tuo zaino tattico standard. Non puoi metterci molto dentro, ma ti rende più agile.\n\n(Aumenta la velocità di movimento e il peso massimo trasportabile di 5 kg)

trans-unit.id: Basic, ordinary, every day, run of the mill, nondescript, conventional, commonplace, humdrum, standard, middle-of-the-road, garden-variety low-top shoes.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)
trans-unit.source: Basic, ordinary, every day, run of the mill, nondescript, conventional, commonplace, humdrum, standard, middle-of-the-road, garden-variety low-top shoes.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)
trans-unit.target: Scarpe di profilo basso da giardinaggio essenziali, ordinarie, giornaliere, non caratteristiche, convenzionali, comuni, monotone, standard, moderate.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando strumenti del 10%)

trans-unit.id: I have no idea why it's called that but it's not edible.
trans-unit.source: I have no idea why it's called that but it's not edible.
trans-unit.target: Non so perché si chiami così, ma non è commestibile.

trans-unit.id: An iron hardhat with a light source for the darkest places.\n\n(Flashlight)
trans-unit.source: An iron hardhat with a light source for the darkest places.\n\n(Flashlight)
trans-unit.target: Un elmetto di ferro con una fonte luminosa per i luoghi più bui.\n\n(Torcia)

trans-unit.id: A pair of crude canvas boots for your everyday use.
trans-unit.source: A pair of crude canvas boots for your everyday use.
trans-unit.target: Un paio di stivali rudimentali per l'utilizzo quotidiano.
Pantaloni in tela cuciti in modo rudimentale.

trans-unit.id: They're like the Primitive Canvas Pants, but shorter.
trans-unit.source: They're like the Primitive Canvas Pants, but shorter.
trans-unit.target: Sono come i Pantaloni in tela rudimentali, ma più corti.

trans-unit.id: You should probably still wear pants.
trans-unit.source: You should probably still wear pants.
trans-unit.target: Probabilmente, dovresti comunque indossare dei pantaloni.

trans-unit.id: A pair of crude leather boots for your everyday use.
trans-unit.source: A pair of crude leather boots for your everyday use.
trans-unit.target: Un paio di rudimentali stivali in pelle, per l'utilizzo quotidiano.

trans-unit.id: You ever tried cutting leather with a rock?
trans-unit.source: You ever tried cutting leather with a rock?
trans-unit.target: Hai mai provato a tagliare la pelle con una roccia?

trans-unit.id: A Shirt made from roughly cut pieces of leather, should keep your shoulders warm.
trans-unit.source: A Shirt made from roughly cut pieces of leather, should keep your shoulders warm.
trans-unit.target: Una camicia cucita da pezzi di pelle tagliati in modo rudimentale, dovrebbe tenerti calde le spalle.

trans-unit.id: You may have enough leather left over to make a nice hat.
trans-unit.source: You may have enough leather left over to make a nice hat.
trans-unit.target: Potresti avere pelle a sufficienza rimanente, per creare un bel cappello.

trans-unit.id: Light weight shoes designed to make you run faster.\n\n(Increases movement speed)
trans-unit.source: Light weight shoes designed to make you run faster.\n\n(Increases movement speed)
trans-unit.target: Scarpe leggere progettate per farti correre più velocemente.\n\n(Aumenta la velocità di movimento)

trans-unit.id: Basic footwear that helps reduce the strain of walking longer distances.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)
trans-unit.source: Basic footwear that helps reduce the strain of walking longer distances.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)
trans-unit.target: Calzature di base che aiutano a ridurre lo stress di camminare per lunghe distanze.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 10%)

trans-unit.id: A simple sailor's cap, don?t lose it or you might be walking on a plank.
trans-unit.source: A simple sailor's cap, don?t lose it or you might be walking on a plank.
trans-unit.target: Un semplice cappello da marinaio, non perderlo o potresti dover camminare sulla tavola.

trans-unit.id: Denim overall for extra sturdy wearability.
trans-unit.source: Denim overall for extra sturdy wearability.
trans-unit.target: Salopette di jeans per un'indossabilità più robusta.

trans-unit.id: Comfortable sandals with extra traction to avoid slipping.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Comfortable sandals with extra traction to avoid slipping.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Comodi sandali con una maggiore trazione, per evitare di scivolare.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 30$)

trans-unit.id: A striped shirt symbolizing your affinity for traveling across the seas.
trans-unit.source: A striped shirt symbolizing your affinity for traveling across the seas.
trans-unit.target: Una camicia a strisce che simboleggia la tua affinità al navigare i mari.

trans-unit.id: Heavy duty steel-toed boots.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Heavy duty steel-toed boots.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Stivali pesanti con punta d'acciaio.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 30%)

trans-unit.id: A simple cotton shirt helps reduce the strain of heat exposure.
trans-unit.source: A simple cotton shirt helps reduce the strain of heat exposure.
trans-unit.target: Una semplice camicia in cotone che aiuta a ridurre lo stress dell'esposizione al calore.

trans-unit.id: Two-toned suede shoes.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.source: Two-toned suede shoes.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 30%)
trans-unit.target: Scarpe di camoscio bicolore.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 30%)

trans-unit.id: Helps keep the sun off your face... and neck... and also ears.
trans-unit.source: Helps keep the sun off your face... and neck... and also ears.
trans-unit.target: Aiuta a tenere il Sole lontano dal tuo viso... e dal collo... e anche dalle orecchie.
Cappello di pelle dell'esperto di trappole

trans-unit.id: A simply made canvas shirt. Does not have a pocket to put your pen in.
trans-unit.source: A simply made canvas shirt. Does not have a pocket to put your pen in.
trans-unit.target: Una semplice camicia in tela. Non ha una tasca per metterci la penna.

trans-unit.id: A rough linen cowl lowered, showing your face.
trans-unit.source: A rough linen cowl lowered, showing your face.
trans-unit.target: Un rudimentale cappuccio abbassato in lino, che mostra il tuo volto.

trans-unit.id: A rough linen cowl raised, hiding your face partially.
trans-unit.source: A rough linen cowl raised, hiding your face partially.
trans-unit.target: Un rudimentale cappuccio alzato in lino, che nasconde parzialmente il tuo volto.

trans-unit.id: A quality linen cowl lowered, showing your face.
trans-unit.source: A quality linen cowl lowered, showing your face.
trans-unit.target: Un cappuccio abbassato di lino di qualità, che mostra il tuo volto.

trans-unit.id: A quality linen cowl raised, hiding your face partially.
trans-unit.source: A quality linen cowl raised, hiding your face partially.
trans-unit.target: Un cappuccio alzato di lino di qualità, che nasconde parzialmente il tuo volto.

trans-unit.id: Lighter pack that causes lower calorie consumption.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10% and increases max carry weight by 5 kg)
trans-unit.source: Lighter pack that causes lower calorie consumption.\n\n(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10% and increases max carry weight by 5 kg)
trans-unit.target: Zaino più leggero che causa un minore consumo calorico.\n\n(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando gli strumenti del 10% e incrementa il massimo peso trasportabile di 5 kg)

trans-unit.id:
Boots designed to be rugged and reduce muscle strain while working.

(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)

(Increases movement speed)
trans-unit.source:
Boots designed to be rugged and reduce muscle strain while working.

(Decreases calories consumed when using tools by 10%)

(Increases movement speed)
trans-unit.target:
Stivali progettati per essere robusti e ridurre lo stress muscolare lavorando.

(Riduce le calorie consumate utilizzando strumenti del 10%)

(Incrementa la velocità di movimento)

trans-unit.id: Leaving it outdoors somehow made it more digestible.
trans-unit.source: Leaving it outdoors somehow made it more digestible.
trans-unit.target: Lasciarlo all'esterno lo ha in qualche modo reso più digeribile.

trans-unit.id: Marinated in a mix of oil, herbs and some sweetener really increased the potential.
trans-unit.source: Marinated in a mix of oil, herbs and some sweetener really increased the potential.
trans-unit.target: Marinato in un miscuglio d'olio, erbe e del dolcificante, ne aumenta davvero il potenziale.

trans-unit.id: Basic Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Hunting recipes.
trans-unit.source: Basic Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Hunting recipes.
trans-unit.target: Aggiornamento di Base che aumenta largamente l'efficienza fabbricando ricette di Caccia.

trans-unit.id: QA Test Object adding Bathroom value.
trans-unit.source: QA Test Object adding Bathroom value.
trans-unit.target: Oggetto del test QA che aggiunge valore del Bagno.

trans-unit.id: QA Test Object adding Bedroom value.
trans-unit.source: QA Test Object adding Bedroom value.
trans-unit.target: Oggetto del test QA che aggiunge valore della Camera.

trans-unit.id: QA Test Object adding Industrial room overriding any value.
trans-unit.source: QA Test Object adding Industrial room overriding any value.
trans-unit.target: Oggetto del test QA che aggiunge un stanza industriale che sovrascriva qualsiasi valore.

trans-unit.id: QA Test Object adding Kitchen value.
trans-unit.source: QA Test Object adding Kitchen value.
trans-unit.target: Oggetto del test QA che aggiunge valore della Cucina.

trans-unit.id: For more advanced research and manufacturing. Science rules!
trans-unit.source: For more advanced research and manufacturing. Science rules!
trans-unit.target: Per una ricerca e produzione più avanzate. Viva la scienza!

trans-unit.id: QA Test Object adding Livingroom value.
trans-unit.source: QA Test Object adding Livingroom value.
trans-unit.target: Oggetto del test QA che aggiunge valore del Salone.

trans-unit.id: A basic workspace for crafting all manner of settlement related objects.
trans-unit.source: A basic workspace for crafting all manner of settlement related objects.
trans-unit.target: Un'area di lavoro di base per fabbricare ogni sorta di oggetto relativo all'insediamento.

trans-unit.id: Prints out the current weather status for the entire planet
trans-unit.source: Prints out the current weather status for the entire planet
trans-unit.target: Produce lo stato meteorologico attuale per l'intero pianeta

trans-unit.id: Create a light rain storm at your location
trans-unit.source: Create a light rain storm at your location
trans-unit.target: Crea una lieve pioggia alla tua posizione

trans-unit.id: Create a heravy rain storm at your location
trans-unit.source: Create a heravy rain storm at your location
trans-unit.target: Genera un'intensa pioggia alla tua posizione

trans-unit.id: The minimum size of a weather system in blocks.
trans-unit.source: The minimum size of a weather system in blocks.
trans-unit.target: Le dimensioni minime di un sistema meteorologico in blocchi.

trans-unit.id: The maximum size of a weather system in blocks.
trans-unit.source: The maximum size of a weather system in blocks.
trans-unit.target: Le dimensioni massime di un sistema meteorologico in blocchi.

trans-unit.id: The minimum time a weather system can last in minutes.
trans-unit.source: The minimum time a weather system can last in minutes.
trans-unit.target: La durata minima di un sistema meteorologico in minuti.

trans-unit.id: The maximum time a weather system can last in minutes.
trans-unit.source: The maximum time a weather system can last in minutes.
trans-unit.target: La durata massima di un sistema meteorologico in minuti.

trans-unit.id: Trigger a validity scan of all objects.
trans-unit.source: Trigger a validity scan of all objects.
trans-unit.target: Innesca una scansione di validità di tutti gli oggetti.

trans-unit.id: Sets the calorie multiplier rate of the move object function. This is multiplied towards the total weight in kilos which equals to the total calorie cost per tile moved.
trans-unit.source: Sets the calorie multiplier rate of the move object function. This is multiplied towards the total weight in kilos which equals to the total calorie cost per tile moved.
trans-unit.target: Imposta il tasso del moltiplicatore calorico della funzione sposta oggetto. Questa viene moltiplicata per il peso totale in chili, equivalente al costo calorico totale per casella di spostamento.

trans-unit.id: Should the settlement system be used, or should the old style be set? Forced to false for servers migrated from before V0.10. Note: changing this will automatically change the config enabling/disabling spawning of claim stakes and papers in the Balance Config.
trans-unit.source: Should the settlement system be used, or should the old style be set? Forced to false for servers migrated from before V0.10. Note: changing this will automatically change the config enabling/disabling spawning of claim stakes and papers in the Balance Config.
trans-unit.target: Dovrebbe essere utilizzato il sistema di insediamenti, o il vecchio stile? Forzato a false per i server migrati dalla V0.10 o precedenti. Nota: modificarlo, cambierà automaticamente la configurazione che abilita/disabilita la generazione di paletti di rivendicazione e documenti nella Configurazione di bilanciamento.

trans-unit.id: Should the achievements be enabled or not?
trans-unit.source: Should the achievements be enabled or not?
trans-unit.target: Gli obiettivi dovrebbero essere abilitati o no?

trans-unit.id: Should the Camera mode be enabled?
trans-unit.source: Should the Camera mode be enabled?
trans-unit.target: La modalità Videocamera dovrebbe essere abilitata?

trans-unit.id: When set, new users will treated to a delightful smorgasbord of initial spawn positions to choose from. Will also show settlements accepting new citizens. When false, will spawn at the default position without user prompting.
trans-unit.source: When set, new users will treated to a delightful smorgasbord of initial spawn positions to choose from. Will also show settlements accepting new citizens. When false, will spawn at the default position without user prompting.
trans-unit.target: Quando impostato, ai nuovi utenti sarà offerto un buffet di luoghi di generazione iniziale tra cui scegliere. Inoltre, mostrerà gli insediamenti che accettano nuovi cittadini. Quando false, genererà alla posizione predefinita, senza richiederlo al'utente.
Approva automaticamente le immagini della stampante
Approva automaticamente la foto di gioco

trans-unit.id: Max dimension allowed for user texture, default is 512 pixels (allowing textures up to 512x512 pixels)
trans-unit.source: Max dimension allowed for user texture, default is 512 pixels (allowing textures up to 512x512 pixels)
trans-unit.target: Dimensioni massime consentite per la texture dell'utente, predefinita a 512 pixel (consentendo texture fino a 512x512 pixel)

trans-unit.id: Should newly submitted textures from the users's storage wait be automatically approved displaying them? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players, and should stay disabled on public servers.
trans-unit.source: Should newly submitted textures from the users's storage wait be automatically approved displaying them? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players, and should stay disabled on public servers.
trans-unit.target: Le nuove texture dall'archiviazione dell'utente dovrebbero essere approvate automaticamente? Questo è un livello di protezione dalla visualizzazione di immagini inappropriate ai giocatori, e dovrebbe rimanere disabilitato sui server pubblici.

trans-unit.id: Should newly avatar portrait textures be automatically approved? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players.
trans-unit.source: Should newly avatar portrait textures be automatically approved? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players.
trans-unit.target: Le nuove texture di ritratto dell'avatar dovrebbero essere approvate automaticamente? Questo è un livello di protezione dalla visualizzazione di immagini inappropriate ai giocatori.

trans-unit.id: Should newly in game photos wait be automatically approved? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players.
trans-unit.source: Should newly in game photos wait be automatically approved? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players.
trans-unit.target: Le nuove foto di gioco dovrebbero essere approvate automaticamente? Questo è un livello di protezione dalla visualizzazione di immagini inappropriate ai giocatori.

trans-unit.id: Dumps all items from your vehicle inventory.
trans-unit.source: Dumps all items from your vehicle inventory.
trans-unit.target: Getta tutti gli oggetti dall'inventario del tuo veicolo.

trans-unit.id: Kills all plants in an area. Pass false to not delete them.
trans-unit.source: Kills all plants in an area. Pass false to not delete them.
trans-unit.target: Uccidi tutte le piante in un'area. Passa false per non eliminarle.

trans-unit.id: Kills all trees in an area. Pass false to only cut them.
trans-unit.source: Kills all trees in an area. Pass false to only cut them.
trans-unit.target: Uccidi tutti gli alberi in un'area. Passa false per abbatterli soltanto.

trans-unit.id: Destroys all rubble in the world
trans-unit.source: Destroys all rubble in the world
trans-unit.target: Distrugge tutte le macerie nel mondo

trans-unit.id: Advertisement To New People Entering World
trans-unit.source: Advertisement To New People Entering World
trans-unit.target: Annuncio ai nuovi arrivati nel mondo

trans-unit.id: Destroy the settlement and remove all citizens, influence, laws, etc.
trans-unit.source: Destroy the settlement and remove all citizens, influence, laws, etc.
trans-unit.target: Distruggi l'insediamento e rimuovi tutti i cittadini, influenza, leggi, etc.

trans-unit.id: An explanation why they're being removed.
trans-unit.source: An explanation why they're being removed.
trans-unit.target: Una spiegazione del perché stanno venendo rimossi.

trans-unit.id: Remove all the applications and invitations that this settlement has sent.
trans-unit.source: Remove all the applications and invitations that this settlement has sent.
trans-unit.target: Rimuovi tutte le domande e gli inviti inviati da questo insediamento.

trans-unit.id: Leave citizenship of whatever settlement you are a citizen of.
trans-unit.source: Leave citizenship of whatever settlement you are a citizen of.
trans-unit.target: Abbandona la cittadinanza di qualsiasi insediamento tu sia un cittadino.

trans-unit.id: A founded settlement foundation will provide this much influence, without any culture.
trans-unit.source: A founded settlement foundation will provide this much influence, without any culture.

trans-unit.id: The influence gained from the different deeds that are created inside the settlement will be multiplied by this value.
trans-unit.source: The influence gained from the different deeds that are created inside the settlement will be multiplied by this value.
trans-unit.target: L'influenza ottenuta dai diversi atti creati nell'insediamento, sarà moltiplicata per questo valore.

trans-unit.id: Maps culture (which can climb to infinity) to influence, which can have a different max for each type of settlement.
trans-unit.source: Maps culture (which can climb to infinity) to influence, which can have a different max for each type of settlement.
trans-unit.target: Mappa la cultura (che può aumentare all'infinito) all'influenza, che può avere un massimo differente per ogni tipo di insediamento.

trans-unit.id: Max reputation a settlement can give/remove in total per day.
trans-unit.source: Max reputation a settlement can give/remove in total per day.
trans-unit.target: Reputazione massima che un insediamento può dare/rimuovere in totale, al giorno.

trans-unit.id: Max reputation a settlement can give/remove to a single target per day.
trans-unit.source: Max reputation a settlement can give/remove to a single target per day.
trans-unit.target: Reputazione massima che un insediamento può dare/rimuovere a un singolo obiettivo, al giorno.

trans-unit.id: Max reputation a settlement can give/remove to a single target in aggregate.
trans-unit.source: Max reputation a settlement can give/remove to a single target in aggregate.
trans-unit.target: Reputazione massima che un insediamento può dare/rimuovere a un singolo obiettivo, complessivamente.

trans-unit.id: Min reputation a settlement can give/remove to a single target in aggregate.
trans-unit.source: Min reputation a settlement can give/remove to a single target in aggregate.
trans-unit.target: Reputazione minima che un insediamento può dare a/rimuovere da un singolo obiettivo, nel complesso.

trans-unit.id: The min value of the range is 'at this many neighboring plots or lower, the culture is weighted to 0', and max value of the range is 'at this many neighboring plots or lower, the culture is weighted to 100'. Values between are interpolated from 0 - 100.
trans-unit.source: The min value of the range is 'at this many neighboring plots or lower, the culture is weighted to 0', and max value of the range is 'at this many neighboring plots or lower, the culture is weighted to 100'. Values between are interpolated from 0 - 100.
trans-unit.target: Il valore minimo dell'intervallo è 'a questi lotti limitrofi o inferiore, la cultura è ponderata a 0' e il valore massimo è 'a questi lotti limitrofi o inferiore, la cultura è ponderata a 100'. I valori mediani sono inframezzati da 0 a 100.

trans-unit.id: Defines what percent of citizens a source settlement must have more than, relative to a target settlement in order to annex (1 means 'same number', .5 means 'half')
trans-unit.source: Defines what percent of citizens a source settlement must have more than, relative to a target settlement in order to annex (1 means 'same number', .5 means 'half')
trans-unit.target: Definisce quale percentuale di cittadini un insediamento d'origine dovrebbe avere, rispetto a un insediamento di destinazione, per poterlo annettere (1 significa 'stesso numero', .5 significa 'metà')

trans-unit.id: When an annexation happens, the resources used in the anneaxtion will have this percent destroyed, with the rest given to the non-abandoned citizens of the target of the annex. These are wasted resources due to forcing an action rather than coming to an agreement. 1 means destroy everything, .5 means destroy half, 0 means destroy none.
trans-unit.source: When an annexation happens, the resources used in the anneaxtion will have this percent destroyed, with the rest given to the non-abandoned citizens of the target of the annex. These are wasted resources due to forcing an action rather than coming to an agreement. 1 means destroy everything, .5 means destroy half, 0 means destroy none.
trans-unit.target: Quando si verifica un'annessione, le risorse utilizzate saranno distrutte per questa percentuale, con il resto dato ai cittadini rimanenti dell'obiettivo dell'annessione. Queste sono le risorse sprecate a causa di un'azione forzata, piuttosto che provenienti da un accordo. 1 significa distruggi tutto, .5 significa distruggi metà, 0 significa non distruggere nulla.

trans-unit.id: The resources that must be collected to annext with the given source
trans-unit.source: The resources that must be collected to annext with the given source
trans-unit.target: Le risorse che devono essere raccolte per l'annessione con la data fonte

trans-unit.id: After a settlement of the given type is annexed, it cannot secede until this many days have passed.
trans-unit.source: After a settlement of the given type is annexed, it cannot secede until this many days have passed.
trans-unit.target: Dopo che un insediamento del dato tipo viene annesso, non può separarsi fino al passaggio di questa quantità di giorni.

trans-unit.id: Boost in culture for target of annexation that has an unfounded parent settlement (like a homestead trying to start a town).
trans-unit.source: Boost in culture for target of annexation that has an unfounded parent settlement (like a homestead trying to start a town).
trans-unit.target: Potenziamento culturale per l'obiettivo di annessione, avente un insediamento superiore non fondato (come una fattoria che prova a creare un villaggio).

trans-unit.id: Boost in culture for target of annexation that has an unfounded parent settlement, per citizen past the first one.
trans-unit.source: Boost in culture for target of annexation that has an unfounded parent settlement, per citizen past the first one.
trans-unit.target: Potenziamento culturale per l'obiettivo di annessione, avente un insediamento superiore, per cittadino successivo al primo.

trans-unit.id: Boost in culture for target of annexation that has an unfounded parent settlement, per child settlement past the first one.
trans-unit.source: Boost in culture for target of annexation that has an unfounded parent settlement, per child settlement past the first one.
trans-unit.target: Potenziamento culturale per l'obiettivo di annessione, avente un insediamento superiore non fondato, per insediamento figlio successivo al primo.

trans-unit.id: Set a culture-boost to lowest tier settlement at position, or specified position. If null is passed, will take the lowest-tier settlement the user is a citizen of, or an arbitrary settlement if they are not a citizen of any.
trans-unit.source: Set a culture-boost to lowest tier settlement at position, or specified position. If null is passed, will take the lowest-tier settlement the user is a citizen of, or an arbitrary settlement if they are not a citizen of any.

trans-unit.id: Citizens Of These Settlements May Expand Claims Within Our Influence
trans-unit.source: Citizens Of These Settlements May Expand Claims Within Our Influence
trans-unit.target: I cittadini di questi insediamenti possono espandere le rivendicazioni entro la nostra influenza

trans-unit.id: Specific Citizens That May Expand Claims Within Our Influence
trans-unit.source: Specific Citizens That May Expand Claims Within Our Influence
trans-unit.target: Cittadini specifici che possono espandere le rivendicazioni entro la nostra inflluenza

trans-unit.id: Settlements listed here may claim plots that are currently influenced by the assigned jurisidction.
trans-unit.source: Settlements listed here may claim plots that are currently influenced by the assigned jurisidction.
trans-unit.target: Gli insediamenti qui elencati possono rivendicare lotti influenzati al momento dalla giurisdizione assegnata.

trans-unit.id: Citizens listed here may claim plots that are currently influenced by the assigned jurisidction.
trans-unit.source: Citizens listed here may claim plots that are currently influenced by the assigned jurisidction.
trans-unit.target: I cittadini qui elencati possono rivendicare i lotti attualmente influenzati dalla giurisdizione assegnata.

trans-unit.id: Determines who can claim within our influence.
trans-unit.source: Determines who can claim within our influence.
trans-unit.target: Determina chi può rivendicare entro la nostra influenza.

trans-unit.id: Block Children Settlements From Influencing Property
trans-unit.source: Block Children Settlements From Influencing Property
trans-unit.target: Blocca gli insediamenti di bambini dalla proprietà d'influenza

trans-unit.id: If set, then children settlements of this settlement will not influence the given property. This can be used to make 'federal land' where town laws do not apply, even if the town would otherwise influence the area.
trans-unit.source: If set, then children settlements of this settlement will not influence the given property. This can be used to make 'federal land' where town laws do not apply, even if the town would otherwise influence the area.
trans-unit.target: Se impostata, gli insediamenti secondari di questo insediamento non influenzeranno la data proprietà. Ciò è utilizzabile per creare 'terreni federali', in cui non si applicano le leggi del villaggio, anche se il villaggio influenzerebbe altrimenti l'area.

trans-unit.id: Allows child settlement influence to be blocked on a property.
trans-unit.source: Allows child settlement influence to be blocked on a property.
trans-unit.target: Consente all'influenza degli insediamenti secondari di essere bloccata su una proprietà.

trans-unit.id: Admin Mode: Settlement Must Have Children
trans-unit.source: Admin Mode: Settlement Must Have Children
trans-unit.target: Modalità Admin: L'insediamento deve avere secondari

trans-unit.id: When set, the settlement will be unplaced when it lacks children settlements (or when it lacks citizens, if it cannot have children settlements).
trans-unit.source: When set, the settlement will be unplaced when it lacks children settlements (or when it lacks citizens, if it cannot have children settlements).
trans-unit.target: Quando impostato, l'insediamento sarà rimosso quando mancante di insediamenti secondari (o quando mancante di cittadini, se non può avere insediamenti secondari).

trans-unit.id: Citizens entering the world will be able to view this on map as they select their initial spawn point. Write a brief description of your town, how you want to run it, and why it would be a good place to join (can only be edited by Citizens with Diplomatic Privilege in this settlement).
trans-unit.source: Citizens entering the world will be able to view this on map as they select their initial spawn point. Write a brief description of your town, how you want to run it, and why it would be a good place to join (can only be edited by Citizens with Diplomatic Privilege in this settlement).
trans-unit.target: I cittadini che accedono al mondo potranno visualizzare questa mappa selezionando il proprio punto di generazione iniziale. Scrivi una breve descrizione del villaggio, come desideri governarlo e perché sarebbe un bel posto a cui unirsi (modificabile soltanto dai Cittadini con il Privilegio Diplomatico in questo insediamento).

trans-unit.id: Is this the first time they're becoming a citizn of this settlement (direct or indirect)?
trans-unit.source: Is this the first time they're becoming a citizn of this settlement (direct or indirect)?
trans-unit.target: È la prima volta che sta diventando un cittadino di questo insediamento (diretto o indiretto)?

trans-unit.id: Is the citizen becoming a direct citizen, or are they becoming a citizen of a child settlement?
trans-unit.source: Is the citizen becoming a direct citizen, or are they becoming a citizen of a child settlement?
trans-unit.target: Il cittadino sta diventando un cittadino diretto, o un cittadino di un insediamento secondario?
La persona che sta diventando cittadina.

trans-unit.id: The settlement they became a direct citizen of.
trans-unit.source: The settlement they became a direct citizen of.
trans-unit.target: L'insediamento di cui sono diventati cittadini diretti.

trans-unit.id: Is this the first time they're leaving as a citizn of this settlement (direct or indirect)?
trans-unit.source: Is this the first time they're leaving as a citizn of this settlement (direct or indirect)?
trans-unit.target: È la prima volta che abbandona come cittadino di questo insediamento (diretto o indiretto)?

trans-unit.id: The settlement they left direct citizenship of.
trans-unit.source: The settlement they left direct citizenship of.
trans-unit.target: L'insediamento di cui hanno abbandonato la cittadinanza diretta.

trans-unit.id: The type of settlment to query.
trans-unit.source: The type of settlment to query.
trans-unit.target: Il tipo di insediamento da richiedere.

trans-unit.source: Provides the settlement influencing the given location.
trans-unit.target: Fornisce l'insediamento che influenza la data posizione.

trans-unit.id: Determines if a given settlement influences the given position.
trans-unit.source: Determines if a given settlement influences the given position.
trans-unit.target: Determina se un dato insediamento influenza la data posizione.
Posizione d'influenza del tipo di Insediamento
Il tipo di insediamento da controllare.

trans-unit.id: Determines if a settlement of a given type influences a position.
trans-unit.source: Determines if a settlement of a given type influences a position.
trans-unit.target: Determina se un insediamento di un dato tipo influenza una posizione.

trans-unit.id: The type of settlement to query.
trans-unit.source: The type of settlement to query.
trans-unit.target: Il tipo di insediamento da richiedere.

trans-unit.id: Determines the settlement of the given type influencing the given location.
trans-unit.source: Determines the settlement of the given type influencing the given location.
trans-unit.target: Determina l'insediamento del dato tipo che influenza la data posizione.

trans-unit.id: Measure of how long a Citizen has been a member of a settlement.
trans-unit.source: Measure of how long a Citizen has been a member of a settlement.
trans-unit.target: Misurazione del tempo per cui un Cittadino è stato un membro di un insediamento.

trans-unit.id: House Points Multiplier Per Residents Count
trans-unit.source: House Points Multiplier Per Residents Count
trans-unit.target: Moltiplicatore dei punti abitativi per numero di residenti

trans-unit.id: Multiplier of room per resident count. Could be used to incentive the shared residencies at certain number of residents.
trans-unit.source: Multiplier of room per resident count. Could be used to incentive the shared residencies at certain number of residents.
trans-unit.target: Moltiplicatore della stanza per il numero di residenti. Utilizzabile per incentivare le residenze condivise a un certo numero di residenti.

trans-unit.id: Turn on (default) or objects in a radiue.
trans-unit.source: Turn on (default) or objects in a radiue.
trans-unit.target: Attiva (predefinito) od oggetti in un raggio.

trans-unit.id: Remove given deed or here currently standing if none specified.
trans-unit.source: Remove given deed or here currently standing if none specified.
trans-unit.target: Rimuove un dato atto o quello in cui ci si trova al momento se non ne viene specificato nessuno.

trans-unit.id: If checked, the owner of this deed may claim/unclaim plots on the deed while you're a resident.
trans-unit.source: If checked, the owner of this deed may claim/unclaim plots on the deed while you're a resident.
trans-unit.target: Se spuntato, il proprietario di questo atto può rivendicare/disdire i lotti sull'atto, mentre ne sei un residente.

trans-unit.id: A versatile and eye grabbing pair of shorts that are quick to dry in all situations.
trans-unit.source: A versatile and eye grabbing pair of shorts that are quick to dry in all situations.
trans-unit.target: Un paio di pantaloncini versatile e accattivante, rapido da asciugare in tutte le situazioni.

trans-unit.id: A comfy yet stylish shirt to commemorate the launch of the boat update.
trans-unit.source: A comfy yet stylish shirt to commemorate the launch of the boat update.
trans-unit.target: Una camicia comoda e stilosa per commemorare il lancio dell'aggiornamento delle barche.

trans-unit.id: A captains hat to commemorate the launch of the boat update.
trans-unit.source: A captains hat to commemorate the launch of the boat update.
trans-unit.target: Un cappello da capitano per commemorare il lancio dell'aggiornamento delle barche.

trans-unit.id: A stylish pair of sunglasses to protect your eyes from the glare of the sea.
trans-unit.source: A stylish pair of sunglasses to protect your eyes from the glare of the sea.
trans-unit.target: Uno stiloso paio di occhiali da sole per proteggere i tuoi occhi dal bagliore del mare.

trans-unit.id: A mounted jaw from a mighty catch!
trans-unit.source: A mounted jaw from a mighty catch!
trans-unit.target: Una mascella montata, da una poderosa pesca!

trans-unit.id: A citizen logged in for the first time. This action triggers laws for all settlements on the server.
trans-unit.source: A citizen logged in for the first time. This action triggers laws for all settlements on the server.
trans-unit.target: Un cittadino si è connesso per la prima volta. Quest'azione innesca le leggi per tutti gli insediamenti sul server.

trans-unit.id: The deed taking the rent payment.
trans-unit.source: The deed taking the rent payment.
trans-unit.target: L'atto che prende il pagamento dell'affitto.

trans-unit.id: Max Givable Rep Per Day Per Target
trans-unit.source: Max Givable Rep Per Day Per Target
trans-unit.target: Reputazione giornaliera donabile massima per obiettivo

trans-unit.id: Amount Of Positive Reputation To Give In Order To Earn Reputation Reward
trans-unit.source: Amount Of Positive Reputation To Give In Order To Earn Reputation Reward
trans-unit.target: Quantità di reputazione positiva da dare per ottenere la ricompensa di reputazione

trans-unit.id: Max reputation that can be given to another player or artwork by one person.
trans-unit.source: Max reputation that can be given to another player or artwork by one person.
trans-unit.target: Reputazione massima donabile a un altro giocatore o a un'altra opera d'arte, da una persona.

trans-unit.id: Max amount of reputation, either positive or negative, that can be given to a single target in a 24 hour period.
trans-unit.source: Max amount of reputation, either positive or negative, that can be given to a single target in a 24 hour period.
trans-unit.target: Quantità massima di reputazione, positiva o negativa, donabile a un singolo obiettivo in un periodo di 24 ore.

trans-unit.id: If a citizen gives this much or more positive reputation within a single day, they will get bonus positive reputation themselves.
trans-unit.source: If a citizen gives this much or more positive reputation within a single day, they will get bonus positive reputation themselves.
trans-unit.target: Se un cittadino da questa quantità di reputazione positiva o maggiore in un singolo giorno, otterrà egli stesso una reputazione positiva bonus.

trans-unit.id: If a citizen gives the certain amount of positive reputation in a day, they will be rewarded with this much positive reputation added to them.
trans-unit.source: If a citizen gives the certain amount of positive reputation in a day, they will be rewarded with this much positive reputation added to them.
trans-unit.target: Se un cittadino da una certa quantità di reputazione positiva al giorno, sarà ricompensato con altrettanta reputazione positiva a egli aggiunta.

trans-unit.id: Pay all current outstanding rents and wages.
trans-unit.source: Pay all current outstanding rents and wages.
trans-unit.target: Paga tutti gli affitti e salari straordinari attuali.

trans-unit.id: Allows setting this object for sale, so other citizens can buy it.
trans-unit.source: Allows setting this object for sale, so other citizens can buy it.
trans-unit.target: Consente di mettere questo oggetto in vendita, così che gli altri cittadini lo possano acquistare.

trans-unit.id: Distributes items to new citizens of a settlement.
trans-unit.source: Distributes items to new citizens of a settlement.
trans-unit.target: Distribuisci oggetti ai nuovi cittadini di un insediamento.

trans-unit.id: Who can start elections of this type?
trans-unit.source: Who can start elections of this type?
trans-unit.target: Chi può avviare le elezioni di questo tipo?

trans-unit.id: If this is true, elections can start before the end of the office holder's term, allowing only on the last hours of their term (when that amount is less than the hours an election takes, + 4 for a margin).
trans-unit.source: If this is true, elections can start before the end of the office holder's term, allowing only on the last hours of their term (when that amount is less than the hours an election takes, + 4 for a margin).
trans-unit.target: Se è true, le elezioni possono iniziare prima della fine del termine del titolare d'ufficio, consentendo loro esclusivamente le ultime ore del termine (quando tale periodo è inferiore alle ore di durata dell'elezione, + 4 per un margine).

trans-unit.id: Allows title holders to use Embassy Desk objects to determine cultural influence and annex other settlements, as well as set the new-citizen message.
trans-unit.source: Allows title holders to use Embassy Desk objects to determine cultural influence and annex other settlements, as well as set the new-citizen message.
trans-unit.target: Consente ai detentori di titolo di utilizzare gli oggetti dell'Ufficio dell'Ambasciata per determinare l'influenza culturale e annettere altri insediamenti, nonché impostare il messaggio per i nuovi cittadini.

trans-unit.id: Allows title holders to block child settlement influence on claim stakes from this settlements. This allows creation of 'federal land' where town laws do not apply, for example.
trans-unit.source: Allows title holders to block child settlement influence on claim stakes from this settlements. This allows creation of 'federal land' where town laws do not apply, for example.
trans-unit.target: Consente ai possessori di titolo di bloccare l'influenza degli insediamenti secondari sui paletti di rivendicazione da questi insediamenti. Questo consente la creazione di 'terreni federali', in cui, ad esempio, non si applicano le leggi del villaggio.

trans-unit.id: Force a given citizen to always be a member of a given demographic even if they dont match the conditions.
trans-unit.source: Force a given citizen to always be a member of a given demographic even if they dont match the conditions.
trans-unit.target: Forza un dato cittadino a essere sempre un membro di una data demografica, anche se non soddisfa le condizioni.

trans-unit.id: Force a given citizen to be in the abandoned demographic (self if none passed).
trans-unit.source: Force a given citizen to be in the abandoned demographic (self if none passed).
trans-unit.target: Forza un dato cittadino a essere nella demografica abbandonata (sè, se non ne è passata alcuna).

trans-unit.id: Force a given citizen to be in the active demographic (self if none passed).
trans-unit.source: Force a given citizen to be in the active demographic (self if none passed).
trans-unit.target: Forza un dato cittadino a essere nella demografica attiva (sè, se non ne è passata alcuna).

trans-unit.id: The owner to assign the property. Leave blank to remove the owner and unclaim the property.
trans-unit.source: The owner to assign the property. Leave blank to remove the owner and unclaim the property.
trans-unit.target: Il proprietario cui assegnare la proprietà. Lascia vuoto per rimuovere il proprietario e disdire la proprietà.

trans-unit.id: Change the owners of a set of property. May only target deeds within jurisdication.
trans-unit.source: Change the owners of a set of property. May only target deeds within jurisdication.
trans-unit.target: Modifica i proprietari di una serie di proprietà. È possibile prendere di mira soltanto gli atti entro la giurisdizione.

trans-unit.id: Send a notice in the world news panel upon grant.
trans-unit.source: Send a notice in the world news panel upon grant.
trans-unit.target: Invia un avviso nel pannello delle notizie del mondo, alla concessione.

trans-unit.id: Change the reputation for a user, given from the settlement issuing the law (Settlements have a limit of reputation they can give, shown in ecopedia settings).
trans-unit.source: Change the reputation for a user, given from the settlement issuing the law (Settlements have a limit of reputation they can give, shown in ecopedia settings).
trans-unit.target: Modifica la reputazione di un utente, data dal creatore dall'insediamento che emette le leggi (Gli insediamenti hanno un limite di reputazione donabile, mostrato nelle impostazioni dell'Ecopedia).

trans-unit.id: The settlement registering the custom stat we're looking for.
trans-unit.source: The settlement registering the custom stat we're looking for.
trans-unit.target: L'insediamento che registra la statistica personalizzata che stiamo cercando.

trans-unit.id: If set, the stat recording will appear in an infobox displayed briefly on the screen when triggered by a citizen.
trans-unit.source: If set, the stat recording will appear in an infobox displayed briefly on the screen when triggered by a citizen.
trans-unit.target: Se impostata, la registrazione della statistica apparirà in una casella informativa mostrata brevemente a schermo, quando innescata da un cittadino.

trans-unit.id: Record a custom stat of your choosing. Will be stored under the settlement that runs this law's stat folder.
trans-unit.source: Record a custom stat of your choosing. Will be stored under the settlement that runs this law's stat folder.
trans-unit.target: Registra una statistica personalizzata di tua scelta. Sarà archiviata nell'insediamento che esegue la cartella statistica di questa legge.

trans-unit.id: The account to send the funds from. Must specify a government account in the same jurisdiction.
trans-unit.source: The account to send the funds from. Must specify a government account in the same jurisdiction.
trans-unit.target: Il conto da cui inviare i fondi. Devi specificare un conto del Governo nella stessa giurisdizione.

trans-unit.id: The citizens that will be receiving the money.
trans-unit.source: The citizens that will be receiving the money.
trans-unit.target: I cittadini che riceveranno il denaro.

trans-unit.id: The citizens that will be getting taxed.
trans-unit.source: The citizens that will be getting taxed.

trans-unit.id: The bank account where the tax will be placed. Must specify a government account in the same jurisdiction.
trans-unit.source: The bank account where the tax will be placed. Must specify a government account in the same jurisdiction.
trans-unit.target: Il conto bancario dove sarà posizionata la tassa. Devi specificare un conto del Governo nella stessa giurisdizione.

trans-unit.id: Holdings of this bank account will be used to perform the transfer. May only take from bank accounts associated with the same settlement (or child) of the jurisdiction.
trans-unit.source: Holdings of this bank account will be used to perform the transfer. May only take from bank accounts associated with the same settlement (or child) of the jurisdiction.
trans-unit.target: I possedimenti di questo conto bancario saranno utilizzati per eseguire il trasferimento. Possibile prelevarli dai conti bancari associati allo stesso insediamento (o secondario) della giurisdizione.

trans-unit.id: The election process that conducts the poll.
trans-unit.source: The election process that conducts the poll.
trans-unit.target: Il processo d'elezione che conduce il sondaggio.

trans-unit.id: Display to client layered catch data.
trans-unit.source: Display to client layered catch data.
trans-unit.target: Mostra i dati di cattura stratificati del client.

trans-unit.source: Count Of Last Reports To Save

trans-unit.source: Count of reports to be saved and exposed via api. Reports are generated each minute. 0 to not save any history.
trans-unit.target: Conteggio dei rapporti da salvare ed esporre tramite API. I rapporti sono generati ogni minuto. 0 per non salvare alcuna cronologia.

trans-unit.id: Monitors the overall network stability, making all clients send RPC request once in 10 seconds to measure response time. Could be expensive.
trans-unit.source: Monitors the overall network stability, making all clients send RPC request once in 10 seconds to measure response time. Could be expensive.
trans-unit.target: Monitora la stabilità complessiva di rete, facendo inviare a tutti i client una richiesta RPC in 10 secondi, per misurare i tempi di risposta. Potrebbe essere un'operazione dispendiosa.

trans-unit.id: If false, the paramters for giving stakes and claims below will be ignored if settlements are enabled. If true, you will get claims and stakes even on level-up even when settlements are enabled.
trans-unit.source: If false, the paramters for giving stakes and claims below will be ignored if settlements are enabled. If true, you will get claims and stakes even on level-up even when settlements are enabled.

trans-unit.id:
Link to Twitch to allow your viewers to participate in elections, view ecosystem graphs, and more using our custom ECO extension.

Once linked and enabled, the integration will activate when you connect to a Twitch enabled Eco Server.
trans-unit.source:
Link to Twitch to allow your viewers to participate in elections, view ecosystem graphs, and more using our custom ECO extension.

Once linked and enabled, the integration will activate when you connect to a Twitch enabled Eco Server.
trans-unit.target:
Collegamento a Twitch per consentire agli spettatori di partecipare alle elezoni, visualizzare i grafici sull'ecosistema, e molto altro, utilizzando la nostra estensione personalizzata di ECO.

Una volta collegata e abilitata, l'integrazione si attiverà quando ti connetterai a un server di Eco abilitato a Twitch.
Stato d'integrazione di Twitch: Non connessa

Sorridi!

Imposta qui il ritratto del tuo avatar.

Ecco come apparirai agli altri giocatori sulla mappa e nelle varie UI.

Puoi impostare l'angolo e l'espressione del tuo avatar, nonché scegliere vari bordi e i loro colori.

trans-unit.id:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.
trans-unit.source:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.
trans-unit.target:
Le risorse mostrate devono esistere nel deposito collegato al Tavolo dell'Ambasciata, assegnato alla giurisdizione dell'insediamento. Devono essere accessibili al capo dell'Insediamento.

All'annessione, una percentuale di tali risorse sarà data all'altra, e il resto sarà distrutto come il costo dell'annessione.

Se tutti i cittadini di un obiettivo sono 'Abbandonati', non è necessaria alcuna risorsa.

trans-unit.id: Annexing a target requires paying them Claim Papers from the source settlement. Unlike resources, these 100% go to the foundation of the target without waste. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.\n\nIn the case of annexing a Homestead, this number will be increased by the number of Homestead Support Claim Papers that are on the stake. This makes the support claims not only allow homesteads to claim more plots, but have more protection against annexation.
trans-unit.source: Annexing a target requires paying them Claim Papers from the source settlement. Unlike resources, these 100% go to the foundation of the target without waste. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.\n\nIn the case of annexing a Homestead, this number will be increased by the number of Homestead Support Claim Papers that are on the stake. This makes the support claims not only allow homesteads to claim more plots, but have more protection against annexation.

trans-unit.id:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.
trans-unit.source:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.

trans-unit.source: Set Estimated Hours Played Per Day

trans-unit.id: This setting will help match you to a world where Citizens play similar lengths of time, so you progress at similar rates.
trans-unit.source: This setting will help match you to a world where Citizens play similar lengths of time, so you progress at similar rates.

trans-unit.id: Note: These values are generated from the settings \nabove and will adjust as you change them.
trans-unit.source: Note: These values are generated from the settings \nabove and will adjust as you change them.

trans-unit.id: If unchecked, the default world will be used. Note: if world size is adjusted from normal, the world will always generate randomly.
trans-unit.source: If unchecked, the default world will be used. Note: if world size is adjusted from normal, the world will always generate randomly.

trans-unit.id: Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.
trans-unit.source: Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.

trans-unit.id: When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. While exhausted, they cannot spend calories, but can still do other activities like making culture, etc. This setting is used to prevent some players from getting ahead of everyone else by playing many more hours than everyone else.
trans-unit.source: When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. While exhausted, they cannot spend calories, but can still do other activities like making culture, etc. This setting is used to prevent some players from getting ahead of everyone else by playing many more hours than everyone else.

trans-unit.id: Expected number of players that will be contributing towards the meteor. Adjusting this will change the number of specialties each person can take (depending on collaboration level).
trans-unit.source: Expected number of players that will be contributing towards the meteor. Adjusting this will change the number of specialties each person can take (depending on collaboration level).

trans-unit.id: How much collaboration citizens are expected to take part in. High collaboration means everyone will be highly reliant on the society functioning properly. No collaboration means no dependence is required, but you can still trade.
trans-unit.source: How much collaboration citizens are expected to take part in. High collaboration means everyone will be highly reliant on the society functioning properly. No collaboration means no dependence is required, but you can still trade.

trans-unit.id: How strictly do you want to simulate logisitics like transport, inventory carry size, etc. Higher settings will make transport more important (you will need vehicles to move large quantities) and lower settings will allow individuals to carry large amounts, removing need for vehicles.
trans-unit.source: How strictly do you want to simulate logisitics like transport, inventory carry size, etc. Higher settings will make transport more important (you will need vehicles to move large quantities) and lower settings will allow individuals to carry large amounts, removing need for vehicles.

trans-unit.id: Plants will grow overtime, and can then be harvested.
trans-unit.source: Plants will grow overtime, and can then be harvested.

trans-unit.id: If you specialize in farming later, you can build a Farmers Table.

trans-unit.id: Different biomes will affect plant growth differently.
trans-unit.source: Different biomes will affect plant growth differently.

trans-unit.id: A Farmer's Table will let you craft seeds in greater quantities as well as fertilizers to improve yield.
trans-unit.source: A Farmer's Table will let you craft seeds in greater quantities as well as fertilizers to improve yield.

trans-unit.id: As technology advances, you'll be able to use vehicles to perform farming tasks on a grand scale.
trans-unit.source: As technology advances, you'll be able to use vehicles to perform farming tasks on a grand scale.

trans-unit.id: As research progresses, new vehicle types will be unlocked that can transport, harvest, plow, and mine in large quantities.
trans-unit.source: As research progresses, new vehicle types will be unlocked that can transport, harvest, plow, and mine in large quantities.

trans-unit.id: Citizens who specialize in Engineering will be able to build new vehicles, roads, and ramps, making long-distance transport easier.
trans-unit.source: Citizens who specialize in Engineering will be able to build new vehicles, roads, and ramps, making long-distance transport easier.

trans-unit.id: Trade is very important in Eco.\n
trans-unit.source: Trade is very important in Eco.\n

trans-unit.id: There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.
trans-unit.source: There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.

trans-unit.id: Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.
trans-unit.source: Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.

trans-unit.id: The economy viewer will show you all the active trades in the world, as well as Work Parties, Contracts, Rental Offers, Repair Bounties, and more.
trans-unit.source: The economy viewer will show you all the active trades in the world, as well as Work Parties, Contracts, Rental Offers, Repair Bounties, and more.

trans-unit.id: Use it to buy and sell both goods and services to other citizens.
trans-unit.source: Use it to buy and sell both goods and services to other citizens.

trans-unit.id: An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
trans-unit.source: An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
